titleStmt.title: SII 27.168: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 168. (A.R. No. 515 of 1928-29.) SĀLIGRAMA, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. 2) set up in the prākāra of Narasiṁhamūrti temple.
This record is dated Śaka 1442 (expired), (1443 current), Vikrama, Chaitra śu. 2, Monday. Barring the weekday which was Tuesday, the other details correspond to 1520 A.D., March 20.

This record, the bottom of which is built in, states that when Vijayappa-voḍeya, son of Ratnappa-voḍeya was governing Bārakūrurājya, under the orders of the king, the latter made a gift of money to the people of Kōṭa, from out of the siddhāya tax collected from that village which is referred to as the bhaṇḍāra-sthaḷa of the royal palace.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī gaṇādhipatayēṁ namaḥ . nirvighnamastu . namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi
caṁdracāmara cāravē . trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁ
bhavē . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhanaśaka varuṣa 1442 saṁ
du mūṟeneya varttamānada vikrama saṁvatsarada ceyitra śudha 2
sōmalu śrī manu mahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīra pra
tāpa śrī vīra kruṣṇarāya mahārāyaru vijayanagariya
siṁhāsanadalū cittuyisi duṣṭanigraha śiṣṭapratipālakanāgi sakala
vaṁrnadharṁmāśrayaṁgaḷanū pratipālisutaṁ yihalli Ā kruṣṇarāya
mahārāyara nirūpadiṁda bārakūra rājyavannu ratnappa voḍeyara
kumāra vijayappa voḍeyaru Āḷuva kāladalū Ā rāyarige śa
trukṣaya mitrōrjita Āyurārōgya AyiśvaryābhiUraddhiyāga bēkeṁ
du kruṣṇarāya mahārāyaru kōṭada grāmada hattusāvira ma
hājagattige dharṁmmavāgi barasikoṭṭa dharṁmmaśāsana kramaveṁ
teṁdare neṁma Aramaneya bhaṁḍārasthaḷada kōṭada grāmada
lū Aramanege nīu tettu baha siddhāyada hoṁnina voḷage
nīu vijayanagarige baṁdāga nivage kaḷuvakaḍidu dhāreya
neṟadu koṭa kāṭigaThe rest of the record
Digital edition of SII 27.168 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
